title: Feature Scout: Run a fresh Prometheus feature scan right now. Search OpenAI/Anthropic/Google/Mi
prompt: Run a fresh Prometheus feature scan right now. Search OpenAI/Anthropic/Google/Mistral releases (docs/changelogs), X/Twitter for key AI accounts, and GitHub/trending agent frameworks for anything Prometheus does not yet offer. Record every finding with URLs, highlight why SmallClaw lacks it, and write the structured report to reports/feature-scan-2026-03-15.md (title, summary, feature table with sources, impact). After writing the report, call write_note with a completion summary referencing the new file.
